summary: Phase-2 Regelchunk: conditions aus TSR Inc - AD&D 2nd Edition - The Magic Encyclopedia Volume 1.pdf.

source_text.book: TSR Inc - AD&D 2nd Edition - The Magic Encyclopedia Volume 1
source_text.source_file: TSR Inc - AD&D 2nd Edition - The Magic Encyclopedia Volume 1.pdf
source_text.text:
[PDF_PAGE 28 | score=2] Balance Balm Name EP Cost Book/Page Name EP Cost Book/Page Balance A balance is an instrument used to determine weight. The non-magical version uses a beam and counterweights to determine the exact weight of goods. Magical versions, however, are often used to create a balance, to establish an impartial verdict, or to create an even trade of one sort or another. Balance, Conversion Balance, Judgment Balance, Power 5,000 50,000 1,000 5,000 6,000 30,000 AC04-011 AC04-011 AC04-012 Ball Balls are spherical (or at least roughly spherical) objects, constructed from a multitude of elements; from leather to rock, from sculpted wood to crystal. Balls are commonly used to divine answers beyond the user
[PDF_PAGE 39 | score=2] Candle Cane Name EP Cost Book/Page Name EP Cost Book/Page 38 * Magical Products Listings Candle, Black, Clumsiness Candle, Black, Exhaustion Candle, Black, Feeblemindedness Candle, Black, Foolishness Candle, Black, Weakness Candle, Black, Ugliness Candle, Blinking, Large Candle, Blinking, Small Candle, Blue Candle, Brilliance, Large Candle, Brilliance, Small Candle, Charming, Large Candle, Charming, Small Candle, Convocation Candle, Darkness, Large Candle, Darkness, Small Candle, Defense, Large Candle, Defense, Small Candle, Disruption, Large Candle, Disruption, Small Candle, Divination, Large Candle, Divination, Small Candle, Everburning Candle, Exploding, Large Candle, Exploding, Small Can
[PDF_PAGE 30 | score=1] Barge Bauble Name Barge, Hasty, Nyr Dyv EP Cost 2,500 30,000 Book/Page 2023-080 Name EP Cost Book/Page Barrel A barrel is a cylindrical container constructed of wooden slats (staves) held together by circular metal bands (hoops). It has flat, parallel ends; normally the base is mounted permanently and the top removable. Both the base and top can be permanent if one or more holes are cut into the barrel and sealed with plugs (bungs). A standard barrel holds 32 gallons of liquid, or 200 pounds of solid material, and weighs 100 pounds when empty. Barrel, Hiding 2,500 10,000 AC04-014 Barrel, Monkeys - 500 AC04-014 Barrel, Neverending Grog 50 500 1072-77 Barrel, Neverending Salt Pork 100 1,000 10
[PDF_PAGE 43 | score=1] Chalice Cheese Name EP Cost Book/Page Name EP Cost Book/Page Chalice, Planar Travel Chalice, Poison Chalice, Shield Lands 1,000 10,000 DUNG025-11 - 1,500 AC04-024 3,000 25,000 2023-077 Chamber Chambers are cubical or rectangular devices that produce magical effects within their hollow interiors. The object or objects to be affected must be placed inside and the chamber's door must be closed before a chamber will function. Generally, chambers have an activation stud, a small spherical gem, fastened to the outside, near the door. Chamber, Disintegration, 1'xl'xl' 500 2,500 2121-36 Chamber, Disintegration, 2'x2'x3' 1,000 5,000 2121-136 Chamber, Disintegration, 3'x3'x6' 1,500 7,500 2121-136 Cham
[PDF_PAGE 49 | score=1] Cretf Crortn Name EP Cost Book/Page Name EP Cost Book/Page Crew, Unseen Ship Crook, Pharaoh's Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Crossbow, Accuracy +1 Accuracy +2 Accuracy +3 Accuracy +4 Angling Breathing Charming Cursed -1 Cursed -2 Cursed -3 Deceiving Defending Deflecting Distance +1 Distance +2 Distance +3 Distance +4 Distance +5 Draining Enchantment Crew Magical crews increase the number of crew on a ship or spelljammer by 50% without increasing the need for food, water, or air. The crew are unseen servants that can perform jobs like m
[PDF_PAGE 55 | score=1] Dust Name Dust, Comeliness Dust, Cure Nausea Dust, Decoy Dust, Delousing Dust, Disappearance Dust, Dryness Dust, Dullness Dust, Faerie Dust, Feather Dust, Fertilization Dust, Fire Dust, Flying Dust, Fodder (per pinch) Dust, Forgetfulness Dust, Friendship Dust, Illusion Dust, Itching Dust, Leech Dust, Lotus, Black Dust, Lotus, Blue Dust, Lotus, Brown Dust, Lotus, Gray Dust, Lotus, Green Dust, Lotus, Purple Dust, Lotus, Red Dust, Lotus, Yellow Dust, Magic Detection Dust, Mind Dulling Dust, Opposition Dust, Paralyzation Dust, Purification Dust, Repellent, Insect Dust, Repulsion, Small Birds Dust, Revealing Dust, Rust Dust, Sleeping Dust, Sleeping, Green Dust, Smoke Dust, Sneezing Dust, Sneezing
[PDF_PAGE 60 | score=1] Flask Fork Name EP Cost Book/Page Name EP Cost Book/Page Flask, Iron Flask, Tuerny the Merciless, Iron Relic Fluid Fluids are typically found in ceramic, crystal, glass, or metal flasks or vials. Unless noted otherwise in the fluid's description, a container holds enough fluid for only one dose or application. See the Oil entry on page 99 for more details and magical options. Fluid, Mummy Embalming Flute A flute is a wind instrument made from a hollow tube of wood, ceramics, or other materials. To produce notes, the musician blows into one end of the tube while manipulating keys arranged along the tube's length. Very simple flutes dispense with keys and just have holes in the tube.
